name: Shift Burden of Proof for Foundation Managers

eligibility.description: Applies to foundation managers, organization managers, or trustees of black lung benefit trusts facing excise taxes for 'knowing' violations.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS bears the burden of proof to show that a foundation manager 'knowingly' participated in self-dealing, jeopardizing investments, or taxable expenditures.
